context: Tests whether the iOS localization skill gives current String Catalog generated-symbol and plural placeholder guidance without stale availability claims.

checklist.name: String Catalog availability
checklist.description: Frames String Catalogs as the Xcode 15+ recommended workflow and does not claim they require iOS 17 or newer.

checklist.name: Generated symbols setting
checklist.description: Mentions enabling Generate String Catalog Symbols, generated localizable symbols, or the equivalent Xcode target setting.

checklist.name: Stable keys
checklist.description: Explains that stable manually managed keys should be kept or created for generated symbols rather than relying on fragile copy-derived identifiers.

checklist.name: Room symbol
checklist.description: Uses a generated-symbol SwiftUI example for the room key, such as Text(.roomAvailable).

checklist.name: Plural function symbol
checklist.description: Uses a generated function example for the count key, such as Text(.landmarksCount(count: 42)).

checklist.name: Positional named placeholder
checklist.description: Uses positional named catalog placeholder syntax such as %1$(count)lld, not %(count)lld.

checklist.name: Plural variants
checklist.description: Mentions String Catalog plural variants or equivalent plural-ready translator handling for the count string.

checklist.name: Resolved string API
checklist.description: Uses String(localized:) for cases that need a resolved String and does not overroute all localized values through NSLocalizedString.

checklist.name: Deferred resource API
checklist.description: Distinguishes LocalizedStringResource as useful for deferred or system-framework resolution.

checklist.name: NSLocalizedString migration
checklist.description: Treats NSLocalizedString as legacy for new Swift code while acknowledging literal keys can still be exported or migrated.
